summary: RFC 8252 loopback redirect (127.0.0.1, not localhost), verify-env / --dry-run short-circuit before --client-id check, and SPOTIFY_SECRET env-var alias.
reason: Spotify enforces RFC 8252 for new apps and rejects `localhost` redirect URIs with INVALID_CLIENT. The original handler also failed verify because `--client-id is required` fired before the dry-run gate. Adding the SPOTIFY_SECRET alias matches what most users have in their .env (the docs call it 'Client Secret', not 'Client Secret 2.0').
validated_outcome: OAuth login completes end-to-end against a real Spotify Developer dashboard app; shipcheck passes.
